title: OSS-contribution + ecosystem conventions
description: Per-repo slot vocabulary referenced by the oss-contribution skill and the ecosystem/verification guidelines. A consumer declares these in boost.php via ->withConventions([...]); boost inlines them into skill/guideline bodies at sync time. Prototype 2026-06-13 — slot names not yet frozen.

contribution.description: Foreign-vs-home and PR-flow facts for this repo.

home.description: true = you own/maintain this repo (use the owner pull-requests flow). false = foreign (oss-contribution skill applies).

base_branch.description: Default base branch for PRs, e.g. 'main', 'develop'.

issue_required.description: Does the project require an issue before a PR?

pr_title_format.description: Title template if the project enforces one (e.g. '[KEY] {short_title}'); null = none.

branch_name_pattern.description: Enforced branch-name pattern, or null if free-form (rector ecosystem: null).

command.description: OPTIONAL aggregate quality gate, e.g. 'composer complete-check' (= ECS + PHPStan + phpunit). Some repos (e.g. TomasVotruba/class-leak) have NO aggregate command and no 'test' script — then leave this null and rely on verification.per_change / verification.at_completion, which are the canonical gate.

verification.description: Commands the verification-before-completion guideline runs, by tier.

per_change.description: Fast checks run after each edit.

at_completion.description: Slow checks run once before hand-off.

path.description: Where user docs live, e.g. 'build/target-repository/docs' or 'README.md'.
